title: Kitty Crosshair
description: A cute Stardew-esque for your game!
body:
Change your crosshair to a cute little kitty!

May also work for later versions (tried and tested on 1.21.10)

Please note: If you change your GUI size the crosshair may also change size!

Any issues at all please let me know, thank you! Enjoy!

![Kitty Crosshair in action!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5351d78ad825b27f74cb77f06a16fe146ed22696.jpeg)
